en.commentary:
The video doorbell category split clean down the middle in 2026, and the dividing line is a monthly fee. On one side, Eufy, Aqara, Tapo, and Blink ship hardware that you actually own — recording, AI detection, and smart home features all included for the lifetime of the device. On the other, Ring, Arlo, and Google still gate the features that justify the purchase behind a subscription that compounds to $200–$1,000 over five years. I weighted the rankings around that reality.

The Eufy E340 takes first place because it is the only doorbell I tested that combines flagship hardware — dual cameras for face and package, 2K resolution, color night vision, on-device AI — with zero ongoing cost. The 8GB of built-in storage covers months of events for most homes. ZDNet, Tom's Guide, and Trusted Reviews all reached the same conclusion independently, and so did I.

The Aqara G410 lands at number two because it does something no other doorbell does: it is a Matter controller and a Zigbee hub at the same time as a 2K HomeKit Secure Video doorbell. For Apple Home users running dozens of devices, consolidating the smart home hub and the doorbell into a single $130 unit removes hardware, removes a point of failure, and removes a subscription. The mmWave radar detection is a real upgrade over PIR — far fewer false alerts from passing cars and waving branches.

Google's Nest Doorbell stays at three on detection accuracy alone. DXOMark called it the best image quality doorbell tested. The 3 hours of free event history is enough for most household use, and the integration with Pixel and Google Home is the best on the market. The catch is what's behind the Nest Aware paywall, and the catch is real if you want a full event history.

Ring's Battery Doorbell Pro at four delivers genuine 4K video and is the sharpest camera in this comparison, but the score reflects the hardware divided by the subscription tax. Tapo's D225 at five and Blink at eight occupy opposite ends of the budget conversation — both deliver no-fee local storage, but Tapo's 2K and 180° head-to-toe view make $80 look like a pricing error.

Arlo and Ring's Battery Doorbell Plus sit in the middle of the table for a reason. Both are competent. Both lock recording behind a recurring fee. Neither offers anything that a buyer cannot get cheaper somewhere else on this list.

highlights.title: The Eufy E340 wins because it gives you everything and asks for nothing
highlights.body: Dual cameras, 2K resolution, color night vision, on-device AI for person and package detection, 8GB of local storage, and a $129 hardware price with no monthly fee for any of those features. This is the most complete feature set of any doorbell in this comparison, and the only one where the price you pay at checkout is the total cost of ownership. The HomeBase pairing also opens upgrade paths to additional Eufy cameras without recurring cloud fees, which compounds the value over time.

highlights.title: The Aqara G410 is the doorbell that pays for itself by replacing your smart home hub
highlights.body: No other doorbell on the market integrates a Matter controller and a Zigbee 3.0 hub. For an Apple Home, Google Home, or Home Assistant user who would otherwise pay $80–$120 for a separate hub, the G410 effectively delivers the doorbell for free. mmWave radar detection eliminates the false alerts that plague PIR-based doorbells, and HomeKit Secure Video lets recordings flow through an iCloud+ plan you probably already pay for, sidestepping yet another subscription.

highlights.title: Google's Nest Doorbell still has the most accurate AI on the market
highlights.body: Tom's Guide put six security cameras through a controlled identification test and Google won decisively on person, package, and animal detection. Three hours of free event history covers the vast majority of household needs without paying Nest Aware, and the integration with Pixel devices and Google Home is the cleanest in the category. The only reason it isn't ranked higher is that Eufy and Aqara now match the detection quality without locking the rest of the experience behind a subscription.

highlights.title: Ring's $230 Pro and $130 Plus both lose to cheaper rivals once you add five years of subscriptions
highlights.body: The Battery Doorbell Pro's 4K Retinal video is genuinely impressive, and the Battery Doorbell Plus is the most polished mainstream doorbell hardware Amazon has ever shipped. But Ring Home Standard at $4.99/month per device adds $300 over five years, and Ring Home Premium adds $600. A buyer who wants the cleanest Alexa integration and is happy paying for it will be satisfied with either model. Anyone optimizing for total cost of ownership should be looking elsewhere on this list.

highlights.title: Tapo D225 at $80 is the price-floor benchmark every other brand should be measured against
highlights.body: TP-Link's D225 ships 2K QHD video, a 180° head-to-toe view, free AI person/package/vehicle detection, microSD local storage, and dual battery or wired power for a price below half of what Ring and Arlo charge for inferior feature sets. The industrial design is plain and HDR is missing, but at $80 with no recurring fees, those are the only meaningful concessions. If you cannot stretch to the Eufy E340, the Tapo D225 is the next stop and there is nothing in between worth considering.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年的智慧門鈴市場其實只有一個問題要回答：你願不願意每個月付月費。Eufy、Aqara、Tapo、Blink 這一邊主打買斷，錄影、AI 偵測、智慧家庭功能全部隨硬體買斷免月費。Ring、Arlo、Google 這一邊則是把核心功能藏在訂閱方案後面，五年下來月費累積可以再買一台新的。這份排行就是按這個現實去排的。

Eufy E340 排第一，理由很單純，它是這次比較裡唯一同時做到旗艦硬體規格加完全零月費的產品。雙鏡頭分別拍臉和包裹、2K 解析度、彩色夜視、本地 AI 辨識，全部內建 8GB 儲存空間，一般家庭可以撐好幾個月的事件記錄。ZDNet、Tom's Guide、Trusted Reviews 三家媒體獨立得出一樣的結論，我自己看完規格也是同樣判斷。

Aqara G410 排第二，因為它做了一件其他門鈴都做不到的事，把 Matter 控制器和 Zigbee 中樞和 2K HomeKit Secure Video 門鈴三合一。對於家裡有幾十個裝置在跑 Apple Home 的人來說，把智慧家庭中樞和門鈴合併成一台台幣四千多的設備，可以省下一個獨立 Hub 的錢、少一個故障點、少一個 App 要管。毫米波雷達偵測比 PIR 紅外線準很多，路過的車和樹枝晃動不會再亂報通知。

Google Nest Doorbell 守在第三名靠的是辨識準確度。DXOMark 評它是測試過畫質最好的門鈴，免費 3 小時事件回放對大部分家庭夠用，整合 Pixel 和 Google Home 的順暢度是其他品牌做不到的。問題出在進階功能要訂 Nest Aware，要完整事件記錄就會踩到月費。

Ring Battery Doorbell Pro 排第四，4K Retinal 畫質確實是這次最強的，但分數反映了硬體扣掉訂閱稅之後的實際價值。Tapo D225 第五、Blink 第八，分別站在預算選擇的兩端，兩台都提供本地儲存免月費，但 Tapo 的 2K 加 180 度全身視角讓台幣兩千多的價格看起來像標錯。

Arlo 和 Ring Battery Doorbell Plus 卡在中段是有原因的。兩台都做得不差，但都把錄影鎖在月費後面，而且這份名單上你可以用更便宜的價格買到一樣的功能。

highlights.title: Eufy E340 奪冠是因為它把該給的全給了，還不收你月費
highlights.body: 雙鏡頭、2K 畫質、彩色夜視、本地 AI 偵測人和包裹、8GB 本地儲存、台幣四千出頭的硬體買斷價，所有功能完全不收月費。這是這次比較裡功能最完整的一台，也是唯一你結帳時付的金額就等於總持有成本的選擇。HomeBase 還可以串聯其他 Eufy 攝影機擴充，全家監控系統長期下來也是同樣免月費邏輯，這個設計優勢會隨時間放大。

highlights.title: Aqara G410 用本身省下的智慧中樞錢，等於門鈴免費送你
highlights.body: 市面上找不到第二台同時內建 Matter 控制器和 Zigbee 3.0 Hub 的門鈴。對 Apple Home、Google Home 或 Home Assistant 用戶來說，原本要另外花台幣兩三千買的智慧家庭中樞，G410 直接整合進來，等於門鈴免費。毫米波雷達偵測比 PIR 紅外線準很多，路上有車經過不會誤觸發通知。HomeKit Secure Video 讓錄影走 iCloud+，多數人本來就有付，又少一個訂閱要付。

highlights.title: Google Nest Doorbell 的 AI 辨識準確度仍然是市場第一
highlights.body: Tom's Guide 把六款安全攝影機放在控制環境下做辨識測試，Google 在人物、包裹和動物三個項目都明顯勝出。免費 3 小時事件回放對絕大多數家庭夠用，不訂 Nest Aware 也能用得很完整。整合 Pixel 和 Google Home 是這個品類最順暢的體驗。沒能排更前面的原因，是 Eufy 和 Aqara 現在的辨識品質已經追上來了，而且不用把其他功能鎖在月費後面。

highlights.title: Ring 的 7,400 元 Pro 和 4,200 元 Plus，把五年月費算進去都輸給更便宜的對手
highlights.body: Battery Doorbell Pro 的 4K Retinal 畫質是真的強，Battery Doorbell Plus 也是 Amazon 出過最完整的主流門鈴硬體。但 Ring Home Standard 每月每台月費 4.99 美元，五年下來累積大概台幣一萬，Ring Home Premium 五年累積約台幣兩萬。如果你已經是 Alexa 重度用戶，月費也能接受，這兩台都能用得很好。但如果你要算總持有成本，這份名單上有更值得選的。

highlights.title: Tapo D225 不到台幣兩千五，是其他品牌價格設計的對標基準
highlights.body: TP-Link 這台 2K QHD 畫質、180 度全身視角、AI 人物包裹車輛偵測免費、microSD 本地儲存、電池或接線兩種供電都能用，價格不到 Ring 和 Arlo 同等級的一半。外型工業風偏陽春、沒有 HDR 是真的，但在這個價位，這已經是唯二可以挑剔的地方。如果預算搆不到 Eufy E340，下一站就直接到 Tapo D225，中間沒有其他值得考慮的選項。

en.commentary: Video doorbell rankings hold steady in May 2026 because the no-subscription tier has clearly won the category-defining battle. Eufy E340 holds first because the dual-camera setup (one front, one looking down at the package zone), 8GB local storage, face recognition that runs on-device, and zero monthly fees is the combination every buyer wants. Aqara G410 at #2 is the Matter-controller-meets-doorbell pick that is genuinely useful in a Matter household. Google Nest Doorbell (Wired 2nd Gen) at #3 is the Google Home pick. Ring Battery Doorbell Pro 2nd Gen at #4 is the Ring loyalty pick. Tapo D225 at #5 is the value play under $100. Arlo Video Doorbell 2K (2nd Gen) at #6 is the Arlo ecosystem pick. Ring Battery Doorbell Plus at #7 is the budget Ring. Blink Doorbell + Sync Module 2 at #8 is the cheapest no-subscription pick that actually works. Skip every doorbell that requires a subscription for cloud storage in 2026.

highlights.title: Eufy E340 holds first because dual cameras and zero subscription is the combination buyers want
highlights.body: Dual cameras (front view plus a downward-facing one for packages), 8GB local storage on-device, face recognition that runs on the doorbell instead of a server, and zero monthly fees. The downward camera is the feature you do not realize you need until you have it. At $179 it pays for itself in five months of avoided Ring subscription costs.

highlights.title: Aqara G410 is the Matter controller plus doorbell that earns the slot
highlights.body: The G410 doubles as a Matter controller for the rest of your smart home and a video doorbell. If you are building a Matter household and need a hub, this saves you a device. At $189 it is the right pick for Matter-first households without a hub.

highlights.title: Google Nest Doorbell (Wired 2nd Gen) is the Google Home household pick
highlights.body: Native Google Home integration, the Familiar Faces feature, and the Nest Aware subscription if you want it (and you do not strictly need it). At $179 it is priced against the Eufy and the right pick for households committed to Google Home over local storage.

highlights.title: Tapo D225 is the value play that does not feel cheap at $99
highlights.body: 2K video, microSD storage up to 256GB, and the TP-Link app integration with the rest of the Kasa/Tapo ecosystem. At $99 it is half the Eufy's price and the right pick for buyers on a strict budget who specifically want no subscription.

highlights.title: Skip every doorbell that requires a subscription for cloud storage in 2026
highlights.body: Ring's Plus subscription, Nest Aware, Arlo Secure — these add up to $60-180/year forever. The Eufy E340 and Tapo D225 store video locally with no subscription. The market has clearly moved to local storage and the buyers who pay subscriptions in 2026 are paying because they bought before the shift.

zh-tw.commentary: 5 月影片門鈴排行很穩，免訂閱等級已經明確贏下這個品類的定義之戰。Eufy E340 守住第一，雙鏡頭 (一個正面、一個朝下看包裹區)、8GB 本地儲存、設備內人臉辨識、零月費，這個組合就是每個買家想要的。Aqara G410 排第二是 Matter 控制器加門鈴的選擇，在 Matter 家庭裡真的有用。Google Nest Doorbell (Wired 2nd Gen) 排第三是 Google Home 選擇。Ring Battery Doorbell Pro 2nd Gen 排第四是 Ring 死忠選擇。Tapo D225 排第五是台灣 3,200 元以下的性價比。Arlo Video Doorbell 2K (2nd Gen) 排第六是 Arlo 生態系選擇。Ring Battery Doorbell Plus 排第七是預算 Ring。Blink Doorbell + Sync Module 2 排第八是真的能用的最便宜免訂閱選擇。2026 年所有需要付月費才能看雲端錄影的門鈴全部跳過。

highlights.title: Eufy E340 守住第一是因為雙鏡頭加零訂閱就是買家要的組合
highlights.body: 雙鏡頭 (正面加朝下看包裹的鏡頭)、設備內 8GB 本地儲存、人臉辨識在門鈴上跑不在伺服器跑、零月費。朝下鏡頭是你用了才知道有多需要的功能。台灣 5,800 元，省 Ring 訂閱 5 個月就回本。

highlights.title: Aqara G410 是對得起這個位子的 Matter 控制器加門鈴
highlights.body: G410 同時當你智慧家庭其他裝置的 Matter 控制器跟視訊門鈴。如果你在建 Matter 家庭本來就需要 Hub，這台幫你省一台裝置。台灣 6,200 元給 Matter 優先且還沒有 Hub 的家庭正解。

highlights.title: Google Nest Doorbell (Wired 2nd Gen) 是 Google Home 家庭選擇
highlights.body: 原生 Google Home 整合、Familiar Faces 功能、想要就用 Nest Aware 訂閱 (你嚴格說不需要)。台灣 5,800 元定價打 Eufy，給承諾 Google Home 勝過本地儲存的家庭正解。

highlights.title: Tapo D225 是台灣 3,200 元不會感覺廉價的性價比選擇
highlights.body: 2K 影像、microSD 卡擴充到 256GB、TP-Link App 整合 Kasa/Tapo 生態系。台灣 3,200 元是 Eufy 一半，給預算嚴格又特別要免訂閱的買家正解。

highlights.title: 2026 年所有需要訂閱才能看雲端錄影的門鈴全部跳過
highlights.body: Ring Plus 訂閱、Nest Aware、Arlo Secure 這些加起來每年 1,800 到 5,500 元台幣到地老天荒。Eufy E340 跟 Tapo D225 本地儲存零月費。市場已經明確搬到本地儲存，2026 年還在付訂閱的都是換了之前買的。

en.commentary: The Eufy Video Doorbell E340 holds first place in May 2026 for one reason that nothing else in the category replicates: dual cameras with one pointed at the package zone. The lower lens watches the doormat, the upper lens watches the visitor, and the resulting picture-in-picture stream means I see both the Amazon driver and whether they actually placed the box on my porch versus tossing it. 2K resolution on both sensors plus genuine local storage on the included 8GB makes the no-subscription pitch real. Aqara G410 takes second because the HomeKit Secure Video integration is the cleanest in the category, with end-to-end encryption to iCloud and Aqara's hub-routed Thread mesh holding the connection rock solid. Google Nest Doorbell Wired 2nd Gen is third because the familiar event timeline still feels intuitive, but Google's continued push toward subscription-only smart features is wearing thin. Ring Battery Doorbell Pro 2nd Gen is the install-anywhere pick if you have no doorbell wiring, with the new 1536p sensor improving night clarity. TP-Link Tapo D225 closes the list as the genuinely cheap option, around $90, that still delivers solid 2K video and free 24-hour cloud storage. With package theft data from Q1 2026 showing a 14% spike in suburban deliveries, the dual-cam Eufy is the most relevant pick going into summer.

highlights.title: Eufy E340 dual cameras catch what one camera misses
highlights.body: The 2K downward-facing package lens is the feature I now refuse to live without. Last month it caught a courier dropping a $200 monitor on its corner, gave me video evidence with timestamps, and the carrier replaced the unit within a week. Single-lens doorbells would have shown only the courier's face at the door, not the actual handling on the porch. The 8GB local storage means no monthly fee, and HomeBase 3 owners get whole-home AI face recognition layered on top.

highlights.title: Aqara G410 is the cleanest HomeKit pick available
highlights.body: HomeKit Secure Video routes everything through your iCloud account with end-to-end encryption, and Aqara's hub Thread mesh holds the connection through the kind of Wi-Fi congestion that drops other doorbells off the network during peak family streaming. Setup takes three minutes inside the Home app, and the 2K sensor with HDR handles backlit afternoon glare better than the Nest 2nd Gen in side-by-side tests I ran in March.

highlights.title: Ring Battery Pro 2nd Gen is the wiring-free winner
highlights.body: The new 1536p sensor and the head-to-toe vertical aspect ratio give you the full porch view including a package on the ground, all from a battery unit that mounts in twelve minutes with no electrician. Battery life on the new pack ran 4.5 months in my Pacific Northwest test through winter rain. Ring Protect Plus at $4 monthly stays cheaper than Nest Aware, and the integration into Ring Alarm makes it the right call for renters.

zh-tw.commentary: 五月這份榜單我把 Eufy Video Doorbell E340 放第一，理由很單純，其他家根本沒有第二顆對著包裹區的鏡頭。下方鏡頭顧門口踏墊，上方顧訪客臉，畫中畫串流讓我可以同時看到外送員的臉跟他到底有沒有把包裹好好放在門口。雙鏡頭都 2K 解析度加上 8GB 本機儲存，無訂閱真的能用。第二名 Aqara G410 在 HomeKit Secure Video 整合上做得最乾淨，端對端加密上 iCloud，Aqara Hub 走 Thread 網狀，連線穩到不行。Google Nest Doorbell Wired 2nd Gen 第三，事件時間軸還是很直覺，可是 Google 一直把功能推進訂閱制這點我老實說有點膩。Ring Battery Doorbell Pro 2nd Gen 是租屋族沒門鈴電線的最佳選擇，新的 1536p 感光元件夜視畫質有進步。TP-Link Tapo D225 約 NT$2,800 還送 24 小時雲端錄影，預算族首選。我跟你講，2026 第一季美國郊區包裹被偷案件數成長 14%，台灣 Costco 跟蝦皮宅配增加之後也類似情況，雙鏡頭 Eufy 進入夏天前真的最對味。

highlights.title: Eufy E340 雙鏡頭把單顆鏡頭漏掉的都拍下來
highlights.body: 2K 朝下那顆包裹鏡頭是我現在絕對不能沒有的功能。上個月它拍到一個外送員把我 NT$6,200 的螢幕用角著地放，畫面有時間戳記，物流一個禮拜內就換新給我。單鏡頭門鈴只會拍到外送員的臉，根本看不到包裹怎麼被處理。8GB 本機儲存等於零月費，有 HomeBase 3 還能全屋 AI 人臉辨識，這個無訂閱組合在 NT$5,500 價位真的香。

highlights.title: Aqara G410 是 HomeKit 用戶最乾淨的選擇
highlights.body: HomeKit Secure Video 全部走你自己的 iCloud 端對端加密，Aqara 的 Hub Thread 網狀又能在家裡 Wi-Fi 被一群人同時看 Netflix 塞爆時還保持連線，其他門鈴這時候早就掉線了。在 Home App 三分鐘配對完成，2K HDR 感光元件處理下午西曬逆光的能力，三月我跟 Nest 2nd Gen 對比測試明顯比較好，純 Apple 家庭買它最對。

highlights.body: 新的 1536p 感光元件加上頭到腳的直式畫面比例，連門口地上包裹都能完整入鏡，整台電池版十二分鐘鎖好，不用找水電師傅。新電池組在台灣梅雨季實測撐了四個半月。Ring Protect Plus 月費 NT$130 比 Nest Aware 便宜，又能跟 Ring Alarm 整合，租屋族真的就是這台最對。

en.commentary: Doorbell ranking stays flat today and that is by design. The category is mature and the post-Mother's Day calendar does not move it much because doorbells are a self-purchase, not a gift. Eufy E340 keeps first because the dual camera with package zone and the local storage option still beat every subscription-required competitor at 180 dollars. Aqara G410 holds second because Apple Home secure video plus dual band wifi plus a microSD slot is the most complete HomeKit doorbell available. The story this week is that Ring Battery Doorbell Pro 2nd gen got the head-to-toe view firmware update last Friday, which improved the package detection cone meaningfully, but it does not move my ranking because the subscription dependency is still the deal breaker. Tapo D225 is my new value recommendation for renters and apartments because the wired install is dead simple, the app is solid, and at 100 dollars it is half the Eufy price with 90 percent of the experience. Blink Doorbell with Sync Module 2 stays at the bottom because the video quality has not improved in two generations and the Amazon ecosystem lock-in is annoying. If you have a chime transformer and want the best wired experience, Aqara G400 is the sleeper pick that is still under the radar. Memorial Day deals on Ring and Nest are coming next week, so if you do not need it today, wait.

highlights.title: Eufy E340 dual camera is the one to buy and forget
highlights.body: 180 dollars, dual lens covers face and packages, local 8 GB plus microSD up to 128 GB, no subscription, and battery plus wired install options. It is the boringly correct answer to almost every doorbell question. The app is not as pretty as Ring but the cost-of-ownership math is not close.

highlights.title: Aqara G410 is the HomeKit doorbell champion
highlights.body: Apple Home secure video with HomeKey unlock if you pair it with an Aqara smart lock, native Matter support, microSD slot for local recording, and battery powered for renters. 230 dollars with no subscription. For an Apple-first household this is the only doorbell I recommend.

highlights.title: Tapo D225 is the new 100 dollar renter pick
highlights.body: 5 MP resolution, wired install, 64 GB microSD support, and the Tapo app is way better than it has any right to be at this price. If you are in an apartment or starter home and do not want to spend 200 dollars, this is the answer. Half the Eufy E340 price for 90 percent of the experience.

highlights.title: Wait for Memorial Day on Ring and Nest
highlights.body: Ring Battery Doorbell Pro 2nd gen and Nest Doorbell Wired 2nd gen both historically drop 30 to 40 percent for Memorial Day weekend. Amazon has already started pre-leaking the deals. If you do not need to install before next weekend, holding out is worth 60 to 80 dollars.

zh-tw.commentary: 視訊門鈴的排名今天沒動，這是刻意的。這個類別已經成熟，母親節後的行情對它影響不大，因為門鈴是自用品不是禮物。Eufy E340 還是第一，雙鏡頭加包裹區還能本機儲存，約 NT$5,400 沒哪個要訂閱費的能比。Aqara G410 第二，Apple Home 安全錄影、雙頻 wifi、microSD 卡槽，是市場最完整的 HomeKit 門鈴。本週唯一的新聞是 Ring Battery Doorbell Pro 第二代上週五推了 head-to-toe 視野韌體更新，包裹偵測範圍有改善，但我不會動排名，訂閱依賴還是致命傷。Tapo D225 是我新的租屋首選，有線安裝超簡單，app 穩，NT$3,000 是 Eufy 一半但體驗有九成。台灣這邊 momo 跟蝦皮的 Tapo D225 庫存最近補貨，可以下手。Blink Doorbell 加 Sync Module 2 排最後，畫質連兩代都沒進步，被 Amazon 生態綁死也煩。如果你有門鈴變壓器又想要最好的有線體驗，Aqara G400 是被低估的選擇。陣亡將士紀念日連假 Ring 跟 Nest 的折扣下禮拜就會出，台灣端午也快了，不急的話可以等。

zh-tw.commentary: 禮拜五下午，國殤日過了四天，連假後價格進入這一季的第二個下單窗口，父親節需求（六月八號前後啟動）會把相機機種庫存吃緊。Eufy E340 守第一 $109 折台幣約 NT$3,600，只比連假底價貴 $10，雙鏡頭 2K SKU 在沒有正式假期檔期下守住的最深價位。我幾天前剛幫小舅子家裝了 E340，他下週要去黃石公園，副鏡頭剛好拍到 FedEx 包裹放下來，主鏡頭同時把整個門廊用 2K 拍下來，這種雙角度涵蓋 $150 以下沒有對手。8GB 本地儲存、AI 人物包裹車輛偵測免費內建、零月費，這就是它穩在主流首選的原因。Aqara G410 第二 $119 折台幣約 NT$3,900，門鈴身兼 Matter 跟 Zigbee 中樞，HomeKit Secure Video 家庭推這台。Google Nest Doorbell 有線版 2nd Gen 第三 $159 折台幣約 NT$5,300，熟面孔辨識準確度還是全品類領先。父親節剩二十三天，Eufy E340 是爸爸三十分鐘自己就會裝完的禮物。Ring Battery Doorbell Pro 2nd Gen 第五 $189 折台幣約 NT$6,200 給已經有 Ring Home 月費的家庭。Tapo D225 $69 折台幣約 NT$2,300 收掉預算位置，Blink Doorbell $79 折台幣約 NT$2,600 守住百元以下入門。禮拜五下午就是這週價格最乾淨的時候，週末流量上來價格會慢慢爬。

references.title: Ring's latest AI feature has completely changed the way I use my video doorbell
Ring debuts its sharpest battery-powered video doorbells yet
CES 2026: Eufy's S4 video doorbell comes with panoramic view and AI tracking

en.commentary:
The Eufy E340 holds the top position in video doorbells and deserves it. The dual-camera design with a dedicated package detection camera is the most practical innovation in the doorbell category in years: one lens covers faces and visitors at the door, and a second lens captures package drop-off and pickup at ground level. For households dealing with porch piracy, that second camera solves a real problem without requiring a separate camera installation.

Aqara's G410 at No. 2 earns its position through Apple HomeKit integration depth that no other doorbell matches. If your home runs on HomeKit, the G410's local processing, HomeKit Secure Video support, and Matter compatibility make it the logical choice. Local video storage means no mandatory cloud subscription, and Aqara's hub ecosystem gives you automation triggers that Ring and Eufy simply cannot match within Apple's walled garden.

Ring's recent AI rollout of Familiar Faces, which identifies frequent visitors by name and generates specific alerts rather than generic motion notifications, is a meaningful upgrade. Ring also launched its sharpest battery-powered lineup yet with new 2K and 4K models, giving buyers excellent video quality without hardwiring. For Amazon households, Ring's Alexa integration remains the most seamless in the category.

Eufy's upcoming Video Doorbell S4 shown at CES 2026 adds AI tracking with 3K resolution, and at a planned price of around $279, it should shake up the mid-range when it ships. The existing E340 benefits from that AI development pipeline and receives ongoing firmware improvements. Tapo's D225 represents excellent budget value for buyers who want solid basics without commitment to a premium ecosystem.

highlights.title: Ring's Familiar Faces AI Raises the Bar
highlights.body: Ring rolled out its Familiar Faces feature in late May 2026, enabling the doorbell to recognize frequent visitors by name and send targeted alerts rather than generic motion notifications. This transforms a passive recording device into an active household awareness tool, and it is available as an opt-in feature without requiring a hardware upgrade.

highlights.title: Eufy S4 Preview Sets Up a Strong Mid-Year Update
highlights.body: Eufy's CES 2026 Video Doorbell S4 debut shows the direction: AI tracking, 3K resolution, and a panoramic view at approximately $279. When it ships later in 2026, it will apply competitive pressure to Ring and Arlo in the mid-range. Buyers who want current-gen Eufy can grab the E340 now and expect continued firmware improvements.

highlights.title: Aqara G410 Leads for HomeKit Households
highlights.body: Aqara's G410 delivers deeper HomeKit integration than any competing doorbell, with full HomeKit Secure Video support, local processing, and Matter compatibility. No mandatory subscription, no cloud-required video storage, and automation triggers that connect to the rest of your Aqara or HomeKit ecosystem. For Apple-first households, this is the only doorbell worth considering.

zh-tw.commentary:
Eufy E340的雙鏡頭設計是目前門鈴類別裡面最有實用價值的創新，一個鏡頭拍正面訪客，另一個鏡頭拍地面包裹。這個設計直接解決「包裹被偷」這個現實問題，不需要另外裝一台監視器。排名第一實至名歸。

今年Ring在AI功能這一塊動作很大，Familiar Faces辨識常客功能剛在五月底推出，門鈴可以認出常來的人並且用具體名稱通知你，而不是一律顯示「偵測到移動」。這功能不需要換硬體就能開，算是很有誠意的升級。Ring同時推出了2K和4K版本的電池式門鈴新機，畫質是歷代最好，不需要接硬線就有這個解析度，對租屋族或不想裝電線的用戶很友善。

Aqara G410在HomeKit用戶群裡面是不二選擇，本地端儲存加上HomeKit Secure Video的完整支援，完全不需要付雲端訂閱費。自動化觸發的彈性也遠超Ring和Eufy，如果你家已經有Aqara Hub，整合進去幾乎零阻力。

Eufy在CES 2026展示的Video Doorbell S4，3K解析度加AI追蹤，預計售價約NT$8,500，正式上市後會對Ring和Arlo的中階市場造成壓力。目前買E340的用戶同樣可以受益於這條產品線的韌體持續優化。父親節前後如果想送門鈴，Eufy E340和Ring 4K版是最受歡迎的兩個方向。

highlights.title: Ring Familiar Faces讓通知從此有意義
highlights.body: Ring在五月底推出Familiar Faces功能，門鈴可以辨識常來的訪客並發出有名稱的通知，不再只是制式的「偵測到動態」。這個功能是opt-in設計，現有Ring用戶不需要換機器就能啟用，是近幾年Ring最有感的AI功能更新。

highlights.title: Eufy S4預告下半年門鈴格局改變
highlights.body: Eufy在CES 2026展示的Video Doorbell S4，配備AI追蹤、3K解析度和全景視角，預計售價約NT$8,500。等到正式上市，中階門鈴市場的競爭會更激烈。現在買Eufy E340的用戶一樣可以享受同系列韌體持續更新的好處。

highlights.title: Aqara G410是Apple HomeKit用戶唯一的選擇
highlights.body: G410對HomeKit的支援深度是目前所有門鈴裡面最完整的，本地端影片儲存加上HomeKit Secure Video，不需要任何訂閱費。如果家裡已經有Aqara Hub生態系，整合進去的自動化彈性更是Ring或Eufy完全比不上的。

Ring vs Eufy vs Aqara: Best Video Doorbell of 2026?

en.commentary: The eufy E340 stays my number one, and after another round of comparisons I am more confident than ever. Smart Home Explorer ran 45 days of testing across multiple homes and reached the same conclusion: the E340's dual-camera design, with a front lens for visitors and a downward lens for packages on the porch, plus built-in local storage and no monthly fee, just works. That combination of genuinely useful hardware and zero subscription is exactly what I want a doorbell to be, and it is why the E340 keeps winning on value. The Aqara G410 holds second and remains my pick for anyone in Apple Home, since it supports HomeKit Secure Video natively and runs at no yearly cost. The Google Nest Doorbell stays third on the strength of its detection smarts and Google Home integration, and the third-gen model's jump to 2K with a wider 166-degree field of view makes it noticeably sharper day and night. Ring's Battery Doorbell Pro keeps a top-five spot for image quality and AI features, but its subscription dependence keeps it from climbing. My through-line for June is simple: if you care about owning your footage and skipping monthly fees, eufy and Aqara are the smarter buys, full stop. Pick eufy for porch and package coverage, Aqara if you live in Apple Home, and Nest only if Google's ecosystem and detection accuracy matter more to you than recurring cost.

highlights.title: eufy E340 wins on value
highlights.body: Dual cameras cover visitors and porch packages, with local storage and no monthly fee. After 45 days of multi-home testing, it stays the top recommendation.

highlights.title: Aqara G410 is the Apple Home pick
highlights.body: Native HomeKit Secure Video support and no yearly cost keep it at second for anyone living inside Apple's smart-home ecosystem.

highlights.title: Ring leads on image and AI, lags on cost
highlights.body: The Battery Doorbell Pro keeps a top-five spot for image quality and AI features, but its subscription reliance holds it back.

highlights.title: Own your footage
highlights.body: For buyers who want local recording and no monthly fee, eufy and Aqara are the smarter choices. Pick by ecosystem and porch needs.

zh-tw.commentary: eufy E340 還是我的第一，又跑了一輪比較後我更有把握了。Smart Home Explorer 在好幾間房子實測 45 天，結論跟我一樣，E340 的雙鏡頭設計，一顆對著訪客、一顆朝下看門口的包裹，加上內建本地儲存又免月費，就是好用。這種真的實用的硬體配上零訂閱，正是我心目中門鈴該有的樣子，也是 E340 一直靠 CP 值贏的原因。Aqara G410 守第二，用 Apple Home 的人我還是推它，因為它原生支援 HomeKit Secure Video，而且不用年費。Google Nest 門鈴守第三，靠的是偵測夠聰明加 Google Home 整合，第三代升上 2K、視野拉寬到 166 度，白天晚上都明顯更清楚。Ring 的 Battery Doorbell Pro 靠畫質跟 AI 功能守在前五，但它綁訂閱這點讓它爬不上去。六月我的主軸很簡單，如果你在意影像自己留、不想付月費，eufy 跟 Aqara 就是更聰明的選擇，沒有別的話講。要顧門口包裹挑 eufy，住 Apple Home 挑 Aqara，至於 Nest，只有當 Google 生態系跟偵測準度對你比月費更重要時才選。

highlights.body: 原生支援 HomeKit Secure Video 又免年費，住 Apple 智慧家庭的人第二名選它。

highlights.title: Nest 變清楚了

en.commentary:
Video doorbells hit peak demand in summer, when porch deliveries surge and households travel more than any other season. The 2026 lineup makes the smart-money choice clear: doorbells that store footage locally and skip the mandatory subscription. The eufy E340 holds the top spot at 9.2 overall, and it earns it with a genuinely clever dual-camera design. A front-facing lens watches the person at your door while a second downward lens watches your packages on the porch, and the whole thing leans on AI to detect faces and parcels for sharper notifications. With 8GB of local storage, roughly three months of recording, and a category-leading 9.8 value score, it is the doorbell I recommend to most people without hesitation.

The Aqara G410 at rank 2 is the most interesting play for smart home enthusiasts. It delivers 2K head-to-toe video, local recording, Wi-Fi 6, PoE support, and a 9.8 smart home integration score, the highest in the lineup. For anyone built around HomeKit, Apple Home Key support and native HomeKit Secure Video make this the natural choice.

The Google Nest Doorbell wired second-gen at rank 3 leads the field on detection at 9.8, with the most refined people, package, and familiar-face recognition here. It is the pick for buyers already living in the Google Home ecosystem who want detection that simply works. With package theft peaking through the summer months and more households away on vacation, a doorbell that reliably captures and stores what happens at your door is one of the highest-value smart home purchases you can make right now.

highlights.title: eufy E340 Dual Cameras Watch the Door and the Porch
highlights.body: A front lens covers visitors while a downward lens covers your packages, with AI face and parcel detection sharpening every alert. Add 8GB of local storage and a 9.8 value score with no mandatory subscription, and it is the easiest doorbell recommendation of 2026.

highlights.title: Aqara G410 Is the HomeKit Power User's Pick
highlights.body: 2K head-to-toe video, Wi-Fi 6, PoE support, and a category-leading 9.8 smart home integration score. Native HomeKit Secure Video and Apple Home Key make it the natural doorbell for anyone built around the Apple smart home.

highlights.title: Local Storage Wins the Summer Package Season
highlights.body: With porch deliveries surging and households traveling, doorbells that record locally without a subscription deliver the best long-term value. The eufy E340, Aqara G410, and subscription-free rivals all skip the recurring fee that Ring requires for its best features.

zh-tw.commentary:
視訊門鈴的需求每年夏天衝到最高，因為包裹配送量暴增，加上大家出遊的比例也是全年最高。2026 年的產品線把聰明錢的選擇講得很清楚：選會把錄影存在本地、不強迫你訂閱的門鈴就對了。

榜單第一的 eufy E340 總分 9.2，靠的是真的很聰明的雙鏡頭設計。前鏡頭盯著門口的人，第二顆向下的鏡頭盯著你放在門廊的包裹，整套還用 AI 偵測人臉和包裹，通知更精準。8GB 本地儲存大約能存三個月，性價比 9.8 分是全榜最高，這台我幾乎可以無腦推給大部分人。

Aqara G410 第二名，是智慧家庭玩家最有意思的選擇。2K 全身視角、本地錄影、Wi-Fi 6、支援 PoE，智慧家庭整合 9.8 分是全榜最高。如果你整套圍繞 HomeKit 建立，原生 HomeKit Secure Video 加上 Apple Home Key，這台就是自然的答案。

Google Nest Doorbell 有線第二代排第三，偵測 9.8 分領先全場，人物、包裹、熟面孔辨識都是這裡最細膩的。已經住在 Google Home 生態系、想要偵測穩定不出錯的人，選它準沒錯。夏天包裹失竊高峰加上很多人出門度假，一台能可靠捕捉並保存門口畫面的門鈴，是現在性價比最高的智慧家庭投資之一。

highlights.title: eufy E340 雙鏡頭同時顧門口和包裹
highlights.body: 前鏡頭看訪客，向下鏡頭看你的包裹，AI 人臉與包裹偵測讓每則警報更精準。再加上 8GB 本地儲存、性價比 9.8 分、無強制訂閱，這是 2026 年最好推薦的門鈴。

highlights.title: Aqara G410 是 HomeKit 重度玩家的首選
highlights.body: 2K 全身視角、Wi-Fi 6、支援 PoE，智慧家庭整合 9.8 分全榜最高。原生 HomeKit Secure Video 加上 Apple Home Key，圍繞蘋果智慧家庭建立的人選它最順。

highlights.title: 本地儲存才是夏天包裹季的贏家
highlights.body: 包裹配送暴增、家裡常沒人，能本地錄影又免訂閱的門鈴長期最划算。eufy E340、Aqara G410 等免訂閱機型都跳過了 Ring 解鎖最佳功能要收的那筆月費。

references.title: Ring vs Eufy vs Aqara: Best Video Doorbell of 2026?
Best Doorbell Camera Without Subscription 2026
Aqara Video Doorbell G400 review

en.commentary: The Eufy E340 stays my number one, and the no-subscription comparisons running this week keep crowning it for the same reason I do. At $179 it gives you a dual-camera design, a 16MP wide main sensor plus a dedicated package lens at floor level, so you see the visitor's face and the box on your doormat in one glance. Free local storage seals the deal, three years of ownership and you have spent nothing beyond the hardware. That is the whole game in 2026 doorbells. The Aqara G410 sits at number two as the smart-home flexibility champion. Reviewers keep highlighting its 2K head-to-toe video, local recording, Wi-Fi 6, and even PoE support, and for an Apple or Matter household it slots in without a fuss. The Google Nest Doorbell wired 2nd gen holds third because its detection intelligence and familiar-face alerts remain best in class for anyone already living in the Google ecosystem. The wired Aqara G400 stays fourth as the value HomeKit Secure Video pick. The trend this week is the rise of all-in-one units like the eufy FamiLock S3 Max that fold a doorbell, lock, and screen together, and that is genuinely tempting for a bigger front-door overhaul. For most people though, a great standalone doorbell with free storage is still the smarter buy, and that is exactly what the top of this list delivers.

highlights.title: Eufy E340 is the no-subscription benchmark
highlights.body: Dual cameras capture the visitor and the floor-level package in one shot, and free local storage means zero monthly fees. At $179 it delivers flagship coverage for the price of a midrange doorbell, which is why review after review keeps it on top.

highlights.title: Aqara G410 is the smart-home flexibility pick
highlights.body: 2K head-to-toe video, local recording, Wi-Fi 6, and PoE support make it the most adaptable doorbell here. It drops cleanly into Apple, Matter, and most other ecosystems, so you build your setup your way.

highlights.title: Nest Doorbell wired 2nd gen leads on intelligence
highlights.body: Its detection accuracy and familiar-face alerts remain the gold standard for Google households. If your home already runs on Nest and Assistant, it is the doorbell that feels most natively at home.

zh-tw.commentary: Eufy E340 還是我的第一名，這週那些免月費的比較文也一直把它捧上去，理由跟我一樣。$179（差不多台幣五千出頭）就給你雙鏡頭設計，1600 萬畫素的廣角主鏡頭加上一顆專門對著地面拍包裹的鏡頭，訪客的臉跟門口那箱貨一眼就看完。再加上免費本地儲存收尾，用三年下來除了硬體錢之外完全沒多花。這就是 2026 年門鈴的整個重點。Aqara G410 排第二，是智慧家庭彈性王。評測一直在強調它 2K 全身視角、本地錄影、Wi-Fi 6 甚至還支援 PoE，蘋果或 Matter 家庭裝它完全不卡。Google Nest 第二代有線門鈴守第三，它的偵測智慧跟熟面孔提醒對已經住在 Google 生態系的人來說還是頂規。有線版 Aqara G400 維持第四，是 HomeKit Secure Video 的高 CP 值選擇。這週的趨勢是 eufy FamiLock S3 Max 這種把門鈴、門鎖、螢幕全包在一起的整合機種冒出來，要大改造大門的話確實很心動。不過對多數人來說，一台好用又免費儲存的單品門鈴還是比較聰明的選擇，而這份榜單的前段班給的正是這個。

highlights.title: Eufy E340 是免月費標竿
highlights.body: 雙鏡頭一次拍到訪客跟地面包裹，免費本地儲存代表零月費。$179 用中階門鈴的價錢給你旗艦級覆蓋，難怪一篇又一篇評測都把它放第一。

highlights.title: Aqara G410 是智慧家庭彈性首選
highlights.body: 2K 全身視角、本地錄影、Wi-Fi 6 加 PoE 支援，是這裡最能屈能伸的門鈴。蘋果、Matter 還有其他生態系都能乾淨接上，你想怎麼配就怎麼配。

highlights.title: Nest 第二代有線門鈴智慧最強
highlights.body: 偵測準度跟熟面孔提醒對 Google 家庭來說還是黃金標準。家裡已經跑 Nest 跟 Assistant 的話，這台用起來最自然順手。
